name: ThirsTea Corp.
description: Thirs-Tea™ is a prominent manufacturer of concentrated iced tea products for the foodservice industry, offering high-quality concentrates made from premium black tea leaves that ensure a fresh-brewed taste. With over 40 years of experience, the company provides consistent flavor and efficiency, making it a reliable supplier for various foodservice providers.

name: The Second Cup
description: Second Cup Café™ offers a premium Brewed Iced Tea, made from high-quality English Breakfast Tea, which is perfectly steeped, chilled, and served over ice, available in both sweetened and unsweetened options.

name: Trout Farm Inn
description: The company offers a variety of services in the food and beverage industry, including a focus on creating enjoyable dining experiences, which may encompass offerings like iced tea.

name: BREWTeas
description: BREWT™ is a retail company that specializes in tea products, offering a diverse selection of over 200 premium loose-leaf teas.

name: Peet's Coffee & Tea
description: Peet's is a prominent retailer of premium teas, including their Iced Black Tea Lemonade, which highlights their commitment to high-quality beverages. With a diverse portfolio that showcases artisanal brands, Peet's focuses on enhancing the flavors of their products through careful sourcing and preparation.

name: Chaayos
description: Chaayos specializes in creating a unique tea experience in India, offering a variety of beverages including traditional kadak chai and premium green tea. Their focus on customization and blending cultural heritage with modern tastes enhances the overall tea experience.

name: CARAMELOVENDING
description: Caramelovending offers a wide range of vending products, including iced tea, and emphasizes high-quality service and product selection. Their commitment to customer satisfaction includes a reliable post-sale service and a money-back guarantee if a product is not dispensed.

name: Flavia®
description: FLAVIA® offers a refreshing Iced Black Tea that is freshly brewed and crafted from real tea leaves, providing a crisp taste with a subtle fruity sweetness. This beverage is designed for quick preparation, making it a convenient option for the workplace.

name: Munchbox Frozen Foods Private Limited
description: Frozen Bottle offers a refreshing Classic Lemon Iced Tea, made with lemon juice and tea leaves, making it an ideal summer drink.

name: Tea Forte
description: Tea Forté specializes in exclusive tea products, including their Gourmet Iced Tea line, Tea Over Ice®. Their unique accessories and artisan-crafted blends enhance the iced tea experience, making it perfect for entertaining.
